title: Move nexus to standalone Coolify hosting model

source.subject: Tracker deployment fixes, Added nexus to the hub

body:
beskid_nexus deploys as its own Coolify service with hub registration and docker-compose runtime catalog.

## Landed

- Nexus added to Beskid hub service catalog (`49c49d7`)
- Green Ladybug/native Docker CI
- COOLIFY.md env matrix and operator validation steps

## Remaining (production evidence required)

- Coolify service healthy on port **8452** with `GITNEXUS_HOME` volume
- `AUTH_HUB_PUBLIC_URL` + `SESSION_SECRET` wired for OAuth analyze UI
- Post-deploy catalog analyze smoke against compiler superrepo graph

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`49c49d7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/49c49d7) (2026-05-29)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `nexus`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-nexus-operational`
